vulnerability.reference: Grid inertia too low to absorb sudden RL power spikes.
vulnerability.generated: Grid dispatch tightly couples to RL actions with no real-time manual override to counteract abrupt unsafe policy shifts.

impact.generated: Frequency deviations and widespread power outages disrupt electricity supply to consumers and grid operators.

dose_response.reference: Dormancy-guided resets from causality-aware entropy regularization destabilize control actions, exposing grid operators and consumers to frequency deviations; with low grid inertia, this causes blackouts, economic disruption, and loss of critical services.
dose_response.generated: Causality-aware entropy regularization and dormancy-guided resets cause abrupt policy changes, through grid operators' reliance on RL dispatch without real-time override, triggering unsafe actions that lead to frequency deviations and outages.
